notes: Composition consequence (docs/alignment/webauthn-reauth.md): the [WEBAUTHN-REAUTH] exchange issues only DPoP-bound tokens, so every token this suite produces carries cnf.jkt, and rs-validation step 5 already refuses it bare — the storage server needs no WebAuthn awareness. The fixture is a valid at+jwt whose cnf.jkt is the committed sk-client key thumbprint.
source: lws-spec@f2e081d core#rs-validation + solid-webauthn-reauth@cf81736 #token-exchange ("there is no Bearer variant") (spec-derived; no reference implementation yet)
title: a token issued via the WebAuthn suite is always DPoP-bound (cnf present) and therefore never accepted bare — the Bearer baseline is not weakened by the suite
